mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT -1 AS PARENT_ORGA_IDX, 0 AS ORGA_IDX, '조직' AS ORGA_NAME FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT PARENT_ORGA_IDX, ORGA_IDX, ORGA_NAME FROM CMS_ORGANIZATION WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ) CONNECT BY PRIOR ORGA_IDX = PARENT_ORGA_IDX START WITH ORGA_IDX = 0 ORDER SIBLINGS BY ORGA_NAME
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, ORGA_IDX, PARENT_ORGA_IDX, ORGA_NAME, ORGA_PHONE FROM CMS_ORGANIZATION WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND ORGA_IDX = #{orga_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_ORGANIZATION SET ORGA_NAME = #{orga_name}, ORGA_PHONE = #{orga_phone} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND ORGA_IDX = #{orga_idx}
